no: mod_installer FIX REQUIRED: The tp2 references three sibling folders (mercenaries/, mercy_of_bhaal/, slaves_of_bhaal/) but mod_installer only copies the wf folder (mercenaries/). The mercy_of_bhaal/ and slaves_of_bhaal/ folders must be manually copied to the game directory, or the extracted folder structure must place all three inside the mercenaries/ folder. Without this fix, all MERCY OF BHAAL (cn:33-46) and SLAVES OF BHAAL (cn:52-67) components fail with missing file errors. LEGION OF BHAAL components (cn:0-32) work fine.

in.t: Copy the mercy_of_bhaal/ and slaves_of_bhaal/ folders from the extracted Mercenaries mod to your game directory as sibling folders next to mercenaries/.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Massive BG2 mod with 68 components adding mercenary contracts, bounty hunts, and combat missions across Amn. Highly configurable with individual toggles.
